name: Do I need a lawyer for ladder fall workers comp in Boise Idaho?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for ladder fall workers comp in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Strongly recommended**—represented claims settle 40% higher, denials overturned.[6][7]

Free consult, contingency fee (10-20% of award).

- Handle paperwork, negotiations.
- Spot third-party claims (e.g., ladder maker).

DIY risks benefit loss.
